creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
This is a consequence of the way FreeBSD-update binary patches are built. The patches from ENs/SAs are applied to the tree and new objects are built, and UPDATING itself does not appear in any of those patch files - it is modified only as the patches are committed to the tree.

We should indeed address this, perhaps as part of moving the FreeBSD-update build infrastructure to use git (assuming this doesn't become OBE via pkgbase). I have no expected timeline for this, though,
